blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
